transcript.clean_text: on stage nineteen of the jira d'italia con balman again took victory a second stage win for him as he secured his hold on the king of the mountains competition only needing to stay on the bike to verona to pick up the blue jersey in the pink jersey fight richard carapara still held the mayarosa three seconds his gap going into the final mountain stage jai hindley was his closest challenger with michelander still at 105 a threat on the podium so to the final mountain stage the last road stage in the last road stage at the gyro d'italia in the career of vincenzo nibali hinley was getting ready for borah handscrewer carapace try to hold on and add to his lead three seconds for anybody too nervous of a gap to take into a final time trial the day would begin in belluno and head into the dolomites a dolomitic monster stage with three giant climbs to take on starting with the passo san pellegrino passo pordoi would be this year's chima copy the highest point of the race followed by an ascent past malgachapela to the marmolado four and a half thousand meters of climbing the last road stage the final mountain dolomitic dance as often has been the case in this cheerleading italian took a little while for the breakaway to go the lakes trying to force the issue on the first unclassified climb of the day eventually a group of 15 would get up the road dorman novak for bahrain victorious and leonard kemner for borohanskara two satellite riders to perhaps help out later on behind bahrain began to work using the riders that most probably wouldn't survive the big mountain testica with 52 kilometers to go alessandro corvi was at the front of the race he attacked and took the chima copy going over the passo por toy in first position he had a gap of two minutes and 20 seconds going into the bottom of the last climb of the day behind the break continued to break up and the magnus group was still at six minutes and not much was happening dorman novik just continued to follow before attacking himself inside the final five kilometers not necessarily just there as a man to help mikhail lander in the finale he quickly set to work to reduce the advantage that covey had where ineos grenadiers began to work with the final five kilometers and the passover a proper beginning the first victims were evident pretty quickly emmanuel buchmann out the back sivikov took over after chulip had done his work and vincenzo nebali began to lose contact as well we were down to the top three plus a couple of other riders hanging on hindley launched the first offensive that did for michael landa kalapaz could follow remember three seconds between them at this point you'll remember that up the road leonard canner had been in the early breakaway and this is where he came into his own hindley road up to him kendra continued to absolutely empty himself and empty the legs two of richard carapaz who cracked inside the final three kilometers hinley then managed to really put the hammer down memories of 18 months ago having taken the maya rosa on the penultimate stage but only leading by a fraction of a second and losing it in the time trial he needed a big advantage here going into the last day it was soon clear that kalapaz was on an awful day the 29 team winner of the giro d'italia having been in the pink jersey for a while was even passed by michael landa vincenzo nebali also up there defending his own position corvi at the front while all the drama was playing out behind would take the stage novak having cut the gap to 30 seconds unable to get any closer kovi taking his first judo and grand tour stage win australia has never had a winner of the giro d'italia but crown prince hinley bowed before the queen of the dolomites the marmolada with a big big gap in front of richard carapaz one minute 25 would be the gap at the end of the day lander got closer to the second spot on the podium calapas did his level best to save things but it looks like it will be heartbreak and a second position should only be the best he could achieve going into the final day barring incident accident or an absolutely terrible time trial jai hindley will become the first ever winner of the giro d'italia to come from australia both he and corvy congratulated each other uae emirates got their stage went and after a day of waiting for many things to happen the drama was condensed into a 15-minute period of action covey winning the stage ahead of novak chicorny with another podium on the day pedrero ironsman and then hindley ahead of lander and the rest jai hindley just as he did 18 months ago pulling on the pink jersey at the top of a mountain on the penultimate day of the race this time however he has a much bigger advantage from just less than a second ahead of tale gegenhart who eventually beat him in 2020 to now one minute and 25 over the former giro winner richard canapas with mickey lander at 151 nibali in his final giro is going to finish very lightly in fourth place at 7 57. pay your bill bal the other bahrain rider in the top five and this is what the last day will look like in fair verona where we lay our final scene of this three-week soap opera a 17 kilometer time trial one that's not simple with toricella climb in the middle at a finish inside the vedona arena similar to the one that we saw when richard karapaz won the gyro d'italia in 2019 this year though borrowing any sort of strange event that honor should go to jai hindley you can watch the final stage of the jedi italia on gcn plus discovery plus and on the television on eurosport you
